content_body:
Excellent family vacation!!! The cabin was great. We really enjoyed the sound of the river and watching the haze/clouds rise in the morning. Be sure to visit Helton Creek Falls. Take a bathing suit and a picnic lunch. Awesome.

We went to NC to whitewater raft at Nantahala Outdoor Center. (The drive is about an hour.) So much fun! Long Creek Falls was pretty and about a one-mile hike each way.

We enjoyed the firepit and s'mores. We also enjoyed watching the river run and the boys swim and play on the rocks. Sitting in the gazebo swing made it a perfect view.
title: Excellent Family Vacation
